summary: Draft PR for src/melee/pl/plbonus added a large C implementation of fn_80039618, adjusted fn_8003CC84 digit arithmetic, wrapped fn_80038700 in a dont_inline pragma, and refined several pl_804D6470_t fields in src/melee/pl/types.h. Bot report showed 3 new matches and fn_80039618 improving from 0.00% to 99.67%, but the PR was closed unmerged with no human review comments.

key_files.role: Main decompilation change: implemented fn_80039618, added a scoped dont_inline pragma around fn_80038700, adjusted fn_8003CC84 arithmetic, and used PAD_STACK(16).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: plbonus.c hunk replacing /// #fn_80039618 with function body
raw_diff: #pragma push/#pragma dont_inline on around fn_80038700
text_corpus: bot report fn_80039618 0.00% to 99.67%, fn_8003CC84 97.94% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Header/type refinement for pl_804D6470_t offsets used by plbonus calculations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pl_804D6470_t fields x0, x8, xC, x10, x20, x50, x54, xF0, x160 changed from padding/byte arrays to typed fields

what_changed.text: Implemented fn_80039618 as a long bonus-flag calculation over Player_GetStaleMoveTableIndexPtr2, Player_GetActionStats, Player_GetEntity, attack/hit counters, stale move table fields, and gm/player helpers.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report fn_80039618 improved 0.00% to 99.67%

what_changed.text: Added a tightly scoped #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around fn_80038700.
Changed fn_8003CC84 digit extraction from modulus expressions to subtract-and-divide expressions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: temp_r3_3 and temp_r0 arithmetic changes

what_changed.text: Refined pl_804D6470_t field types at several offsets from opaque byte arrays to float or u32 fields used by plbonus.c.
Bot report claimed overall matched code +1640 bytes, matched data +456 bytes, 3 new matches, and plbonus .data/.sdata2 reaching 100%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01

smart_moves.text: The implementation cached frequently used stats fields and array pointers into locals before the long condition sequence, keeping the large function readable despite many repeated counters.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80039618 local declarations for aerials, atk_counts, hit_counts, x358_counts, totals

smart_moves.text: The PR paired code reconstruction with header field refinement, replacing several opaque pl_804D6470_t padding ranges with typed fields used by the new function.
For ranges with repeated tests, the added function used loops and a switch rather than fully unrolled generated-looking blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80039618 loops over hit_counts, x358_counts, player indices, and switch over 0x42/0x46/0x4A/0x4E/0x56

decomp_lessons.lesson: Large stats/bonus functions can often be made reviewable by first naming local counter roles and preserving natural loops over attack indices or player slots.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80039618 uses atk_counts, hit_counts, x358_counts and for-loops over ranges 1..99, 0x40..0x62, 0..5

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a matched function needs thresholds from an opaque config struct, recovering typed fields in the owning header can be cleaner than retaining byte-array padding at every accessed offset.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pl_804D6470_t padding fields converted to float/u32 fields
raw_diff: fn_80039618 threshold comparisons against pl_804D6470 fields

decomp_lessons.lesson: Arithmetic spelling can affect matching even for simple decimal digit extraction; in this slice, subtracting the hundreds/tens products corresponded with fn_8003CC84 reaching 100% in the bot report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8003CC84 changed modulus-based digit extraction to subtract-and-divide

naming_conventions.text: Locals used short role names for clear objects and counters, including table, stats, gobj, atk_counts, hit_counts, x358_counts, attacks_total, hits_total, and x358_total.
Unrecovered globals and fields remained address/offset-style, such as pl_804D6470, fn_80039618, x1A8, xD04, xD0C, xDD1, and x160, rather than being given speculative semantic names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: PR evidence does not explain why the pragma was required or provide adjacent-function objdiff beyond the bot summary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(16) at the end of fn_80039618.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The function remained 99.67% per bot report, and no human or detailed objdiff evidence explains the stack padding.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used goto labels to exit positive all-range checks while keeping surrounding loop structure compact.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: skip_only_low_moves and skip_combo_count labels in fn_80039618
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This may be matching-motivated control flow; no review discussion confirms it as preferred style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed division/modulus expression shape in fn_8003CC84 to subtraction-based digit extraction.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Only the bot summary ties this hunk to a match; no detailed asm excerpt is present.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed matched code 67.81% (+0.04%, +1640 bytes), matched data 39.68% (+0.04%, +456 bytes), 3 new matches, and fn_80039618 improving to 99.67%.
No human review comments or review records were included in the slice.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: only PR body and bot issue comment present

follow_up_queries: Player_GetStaleMoveTableIndexPtr2 xC60 xC64 xC74 xC78 xC94

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR 2523 closed, merged_at null, draft true in raw_pr_json
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for changed files
text_corpus: bot report only; no human review comments
notes: The raw diff is complete and supports the changed-file and tactic extraction.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so reviewer intent and acceptance cannot be inferred.
The PR was closed with merged_at null; this intake does not treat the changes as accepted upstream.
The bot report provides high-level matching evidence but not detailed objdiff, build logs, or adjacent regression checks.
fn_80039618 was reported as 99.67%, not 100%, so the implementation should be treated as a score improvement rather than a proven final match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed config fields when a decompiled function proves offset usage
accepted_candidate_records.text: In plbonus, the fn_80039618 reconstruction used thresholds at specific pl_804D6470_t offsets and the PR converted several opaque padding ranges in types.h to float/u32 fields. This is a candidate example for preferring typed fields over raw padding when usage evidence exists.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Decimal digit extraction expression shape can be match-sensitive
accepted_candidate_records.text: The fn_8003CC84 hunk replaced modulus-based tens/ones extraction with subtracting the hundreds and tens products; the bot report listed fn_8003CC84 as reaching 100%.

source_update_candidates.title: Require explicit evidence for dont_inline and PAD_STACK in reviewable source
source_update_candidates.text: This PR used both a scoped dont_inline pragma and PAD_STACK(16), while the slice only contains a high-level bot report. Curator may consider whether existing matching-tactics and pragma standards should emphasize recording the exact objdiff/build reason for dont_inline and PAD_STACK when introduced.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report without detailed objdiff
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR is a useful cautionary example, but because it was closed unmerged and lacks human review, this should be curator-reviewed rather than promoted directly.

source_update_candidates.title: plbonus.c contains player bonus/stat flag calculations
source_update_candidates.text: The changed function fn_80039618 in src/melee/pl/plbonus.c calculates many setFlag calls from action stats, stale move table fields, KOs, falls, damage, and match/player helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: calls to setFlag, Player_GetActionStats, Player_GetStaleMoveTableIndexPtr2
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful source-path classification candidate; not promoted because this PR was not merged and the slice only shows a draft PR.

rejection_notes: Do not record fn_80039618 as a completed match; the bot report says 99.67%, not 100%.
Do not infer that the dont_inline pragma or PAD_STACK are accepted style from this PR alone; no human review or detailed verifier evidence is present.
Do not infer semantic meanings for x1A8, x358_hits, xD04, xD0C, xDD1, x160, or pl_804D6470_t fields beyond the offset/type changes shown in the diff.
Do not treat plbonus .data/.sdata2 changes as accepted data ownership facts; the PR was closed unmerged and the report is only bot output.
